LanguageData.crimsondynasty.label: <color=#B22222>crimson dynasty</color>
LanguageData.crimsondynasty.description: An ancient hemogenic lineage has awakened in the host. Hunger sharpens instinct, aristocratic poise bends weaker wills, and each battle feeds a body that refuses to die quietly.
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_predator.label: predator grace
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_predator.description: Predatory reflexes grant fast closes, clean strikes, and precise body control.
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_hemogenic.label: hemogenic vigor
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_hemogenic.description: Blood chemistry turns preternaturally efficient, accelerating recovery and resistance.
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_mesmer.label: mesmeric authority
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_mesmer.description: A cold aristocratic presence unsettles rivals and compels obedience in conversation.
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_dreadguard.label: dreadguard resilience
LanguageData.crimsondynasty_dreadguard.description: Battle-hardened bloodline resilience dampens pain and keeps the host fighting through mortal wounds, but open flame remains dangerous.
